message:
refactor(robot): extract GetSnapshot for CLI/REST parity

Refactored PrintSnapshot to separate data retrieval from output encoding:
- New GetSnapshot() returns *SnapshotOutput directly
- PrintSnapshot() now calls GetSnapshot() and encodes the result
- Enables REST API handlers to return snapshot data without re-encoding

Also includes updates to wait.go for consistency with the refactored API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
